summary: Completed testing of gamified productivity app. UI loads correctly with all navigation working, but critical mission persistence and completion functionality is broken. Trophy Room and Reward Shop UI components work but core mission data is not being saved to localStorage.

critical_bugs.issue: Missions are not being saved to localStorage despite success notification appearing
critical_bugs.evidence: localStorage shows epic-grind-missions: [] after creation notification appears

critical_bugs.issue: Created missions do not appear in Mission Log even though creation notification shows
critical_bugs.evidence: Screen shows 'No missions for this day' after mission creation

critical_bugs.issue: Mission completion and rune earning not working - lifetime counters remain at 0

integration_issues.issue: Mission data not persisting between state and localStorage despite useEffect implementation

passed_tests: App loads with proper anime-themed UI and navigation
Trophy Room displays all 8 achievements with correct thresholds and progress bars
Reward Shop loads with proper empty state display
Navigation between tabs (Mission Log, Reward Shop, Trophy Room) works
Runes wallet displays correctly in header (shows 0)
Add mission modal opens and accepts input
Date navigation arrows are present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mission persistence - missions are not being saved to localStorage despite useLocalStorage hook. The handleAddMission function appears to trigger success notifications but missions don't persist or display. Need to debug: 1) Mission creation and localStorage saving, 2) Mission display logic, 3) Mission completion and rune earning flow. Trophy Room and Reward Shop UI work but depend on mission data.
